claim_boundary: Freshness audit records whether release evidence exposes source commit, engine version, input checksum, reuse marker, generated_at, producer dependency mtime, and declared input-checksum file dependency mtime. It does not rerun heavy validation by itself.

source_of_truth_gap_classification.decision: Direct science scorecard receipt with freshness source tracking; the artifact itself carries overall_pass, benchmark contract/KPI pass, direct-metric/source-family/public-HF checks, and stability-suite pass.
Direct productization receipt with checkpoint source tracking in freshness audit; the artifact aggregates ML status and checkpoint receipt inputs.
Keep snapshot-level upstream stale/inconsistent policy instead of a leaf row.
Track PM report and closure-board inputs rather than treating the audit as heavy evidence.
Keep operator boards as sourced rollups of PM/freshness inputs, not closure evidence.
